messages.text: I'll help you localize this NFS inode revalidation bug. Let me start by analyzing the kernel source code and understanding the issue.
Let me search for the error messages from the bug report:

Search the kernel code for: 1. Error code -512 or EIO (I/O error) 2. RPC reply handling code 3. XDR decoding errors in getattr responses 4. Any timeout or retry logic changes in RPC layer Focus on files in net/sunrpc/ an...
